texto: Don't be afraid to be awesome. Sometimes being weird and different is good. When you think you're working hard, there is always someone else working harder, so always be yourself and know your stuff.
explicacao: Citação de Jacqueline MacInnes Wood sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Don't be afraid to be awesome. Sometimes being weird and different is good. When you think you're…” articula reflexao, be-yourself, working-hard em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e working-hard.

texto: We are all human beings, and we all have insecurities, but it's about being healthy and happy with yourself. I'm not perfect, and I will indulge in pizza and sweets on occasion. The goal is to make the majority of your decisions good for your body. So listen to your body, and treat it like your temple.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jacqueline MacInnes Wood: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a felicidade. O trecho “We are all human beings, and we all have insecurities, but it's about being healthy and happy wit…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que felicidade, happy, decisions pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de decisions e goal.

The goal is to make the majority of your decisions good for your body. So listen to your body, and treat it like your temple.

texto: As I get older, the things that I want are starting to make more sense. Being able to travel makes me happy, and I am a person that lives in the moment. I also want to live a good life. Traveling makes everyday issues seem so much smaller and really changes my perspective on things.
explicacao: Citação de Jacqueline MacInnes Wood sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “As I get older, the things that I want are starting to make more sense. Being able to travel make…” articula vida, happy, good em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e viagem.
